# btpservice_cicd_repository (Data Source)

Reads a repository from the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "btpservice_cicd_repository" "by_name" {
  name = "my-app-repository"
}

data "btpservice_cicd_repository" "by_id" {
  id = "pb091fd5-845b-4146-9bfc-d8cb74be04f8"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the repository. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.
- `name` (String) Name of the repository. Exactly one of `id` or `name` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `clone_credential_id` (String) ID of the credential used to authenticate against the Git server when cloning.
- `clone_url` (String) URL used to clone the repository.
- `cloud_connector_credential_id` (String) ID of the credential containing the Cloud Connector Location ID used for cloning.
- `event_receiver` (Attributes) Event receiver configuration for triggering builds via webhooks. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--event_receiver))

<a id="nestedatt--event_receiver"></a>
### Nested Schema for `event_receiver`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether event processing is enabled.
- `scm_type` (String) Source code manager type.
- `webhook_id` (String) Immutable technical ID of the webhook.
- `webhook_token_credential_id` (String) ID of the webhook secret credential.
